raw_consumer_statement: An unauthorized user made three separate, fraudulent rent charges on my Citibank credit card totaling around {$1700.00}. Citibank investigated my initial dispute and approved the fraud claim for one of the charges, reversing it. However, they arbitrarily denied the other two identical charges from the exact same merchant, which is a direct contradiction. The suspect has since admitted to the unauthorized theft in writing. Furthermore, she sent a partial payment of {$100.00} via XXXX with a written note explicitly stating, ' I owe you XXXX. ' This documents her unauthorized use of my funds. Citibank 's decision to validate the fraud for one charge while denying the other two identical transactions violates my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act. I have conclusive written proof of her admission of guilt and demand a full executive review and reversal of the remaining two unauthorized charges.
